Command.Name: __default_command
Command.Description: Discovers .NET versions used in the current directory recursively

Option.Description: Whether to write versions to an output file. File path defaults to ./.github/dotnet.json

Command.Name: workflow
Command.Description: Creates a GitHub Actions workflow file for dotnet-env

Argument.Name: file
Argument.Description: Path to the versions file to use in the workflow. Defaults to ./.github/dotnet.json
